title: Entopest 250ml Wasp Lure Liquid Trap Bait - Professional Strength Bait Attractant for Hanging Wasp Pots (Garden & Outdoor Use)
bullet_points: Potent Attractant Formula: Engineered with professional strength, our 250ml Wasp Lure Liquid is designed to effectively attract wasps from a wide area into your traps. This powerful formula enhances the efficiency of any hanging wasp pot, ensuring optimal control of wasp populations.

Easy to Use: Simply add the liquid bait to your existing wasp trap according to the instructions provided. The design of the bottle allows for precise pouring without spills or wastage, making setup quick and hassle-free.

Long-Lasting Attraction: Each 100ml bottle offers multiple refills for wasp traps, ensuring prolonged protection throughout the peak wasp seasons. Enjoy peace of mind knowing that your outdoor areas are protected for longer durations.

Boosts Trap Effectiveness: When used with Entopest or other compatible hanging wasp traps, this bait increases the traps' attractiveness to wasps, significantly enhancing capture rates and contributing to a more enjoyable outdoor environment.

Professional Grade Quality: Trusted by pest management professionals, this wasp lure delivers reliable results with a formula that's been tested and proven in a variety of settings, from residential gardens to commercial landscapes.
